description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular, boxy form with a wood grain texture covering all visible surfaces, giving it a natural and rustic appearance. The front and one side are adorned with large, black animal silhouettes: a rhinoceros on the front and a lion on the right side, adding a playful and decorative touch. The top surface also displays a black animal silhouette, visible from above. The wood grain pattern is consistent and realistic, with knots and swirls typical of natural wood. No visible handles, locks, or drawer separations are apparent, suggesting a minimalist or stylized design. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban parks, themed public spaces, or creative indoor environments.
description: A wooden chest of drawers with a natural wood grain finish, decorated with large black animal silhouettes on its surfaces. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with a playful, decorative flair.
description_view_0: Front view shows a black rhinoceros silhouette on a wood grain surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displays plain wood grain with no animal silhouette or decoration.
description_view_2: Back view shows only the wood grain texture, with part of an animal silhouette visible on the top.
description_view_3: Right side view features a black lion silhouette on the wood grain surface.
